items.title: v2.1.92
items.body_excerpt:
## What's changed

- Added `forceRemoteSettingsRefresh` policy setting: when set, the CLI blocks startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched, and exits if the fetch fails (fail-closed)
- Added interactive Bedrock setup wizard accessible from the login screen when selecting "3rd-party p

items.title: v2.1.91
items.body_excerpt:
## What's changed

- Added MCP tool result persistence override via `_meta["anthropic/maxResultSizeChars"]` annotation (up to 500K), allowing larger results like DB schemas to pass through without truncation
- Added `disableSkillShellExecution` setting to disable inline shell execution in skills, cu

items.title: v2.1.90
items.body_excerpt:
## What's changed

- Added `/powerup` — interactive lessons teaching Claude Code features with animated demos
- Added `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_KEEP_MARKETPLACE_ON_FAILURE` env var to keep the existing marketplace cache when `git pull` fails, useful in offline environments
- Added `.husky` to protected di

items.title: v2.1.89
items.body_excerpt:
## What's changed

- Added `"defer"` permission decision to `PreToolUse` hooks — headless sessions can pause at a tool call and resume with `-p --resume` to have the hook re-evaluate
- Added `CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1` environment variable to opt into flicker-free alt-screen rendering with virtualize

items.title: v2.1.87
items.body_excerpt:
## What's changed

- Fixed messages in Cowork Dispatch not getting delivered

items.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

items.title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
items.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
